name: Giardiniera Redo 2/18/94
recipeIngredient: 4 Green peppers; any color, red, yellow, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the carrots and cut them into half-inch pieces.
2. Cut celery into similar-sized pieces.
3. Remove seeds from peppers and cut into three-quarter-inch strips.
4. Break cauliflower into flower heads.
5. Dissolve salt in cold water.
6. Place vegetables in brine, cover, and leave overnight.
7. Drain vegetables after 12-18 hours, rinse in cold water, and drain again.
8. Select jars with glass or enameled lids. Wash, rinse, and dry jars in a warm oven.
9. In a large pan, combine vinegar, mustard seed, celery seed, chiles, and sugar (about 3 cups).
10. Boil mixture for 3 minutes, then add carrots and onions and boil for another 5 minutes.
11. Fill warmed jars with hot vegetables, leaving less than half an inch from the rim.
12. Close lids firmly.
This recipe fits in a 3 1/2 to 4 quart jar and tastes as good as it looks.
